name: Gildan Classic Ephesians 6 Tee
shortDescription: The 100% cotton unisex classic tee will help you land a more structured look. It sits nicely, maintains sharp lines around the edges, and go...
description:
The 100% cotton unisex classic tee will help you land a more structured look. It sits nicely, maintains sharp lines around the edges, and goes perfectly with layered streetwear outfits. Plus, it's extra trendy now!

• 100% cotton
• Sport Grey is 90% cotton, 10% polyester
• Ash Grey is 99% cotton, 1% polyester
• Heather colors are 50% cotton, 50% polyester
• Fabric weight: 5.0–5.3 oz/yd² (170-180 g/m²)
• Open-end yarn
• Tubular fabric
• Taped neck and shoulders
• Double seam at sleeves and bottom hem
• Blank product sourced from Honduras, Nicaragua, Haiti, Dominican Republic, Bangladesh, Mexico

Disclaimers: 
• Due to the fabric properties, the White color variant may appear off-white rather than bright white.
• Dark color speckles throughout the fabric are expected for the color Natural.

This product is made especially for you as soon as you place an order, which is why it takes us a bit longer to deliver it to you. Making products on demand instead of in bulk helps reduce overproduction, so thank you for making thoughtful purchasing decisions!

name: Soft Cotton/Polyester Walk by Faith Hoodie
shortDescription: Everyone needs a cozy go-to hoodie to curl up in, so go for one that's soft, smooth, and stylish. It's the perfect choice for cooler evening...
description:
Everyone needs a cozy go-to hoodie to curl up in, so go for one that's soft, smooth, and stylish. It's the perfect choice for cooler evenings!

• 50% pre-shrunk cotton, 50% polyester
Heather Sport Dark Navy is 40% cotton, 60% polyester
• Fabric weight: 8.0 oz/yd² (271.25 g/m²)
• Air-jet spun yarn with a soft feel and reduced pilling
• Double-lined hood with matching drawcord
• Quarter-turned body to avoid crease down the middle
• 1 × 1 athletic rib-knit cuffs and waistband with spandex
• Front pouch pocket
• Double-needle stitched collar, shoulders, armholes, cuffs, and hem
• Blank product sourced from Bangladesh, Nicaragua, Honduras or El Salvador

Disclaimer: Due to the fabric properties, the White color variant may appear off-white rather than bright white.

This product is made especially for you as soon as you place an order, which is why it takes us a bit longer to deliver it to you. Making products on demand instead of in bulk helps reduce overproduction, so thank you for making thoughtful purchasing decisions!

name: Keeping Kid's Heart's Beating Crop Top
shortDescription: Here's a Chance for you to Make a Difference.** Every shirt helps make an impact. Made from soft, premium 100% cotton, this tee is designed ...
description:
Here's a Chance for you to Make a Difference.**

Every shirt helps make an impact.

Made from soft, premium 100% cotton, this tee is designed for comfort, durability, and a great fit you'll love to wear again and again.

Most importantly, a portion of every purchase supports Ella’s Umbrella and our mission of **Keeping Kids’ Hearts Beating** by funding heart research, advancing pediatric heart technology, and helping families affected by congenital heart disease.

**Shirt Features:**
• Soft, premium combed and ring-spun cotton
• Pre-shrunk for a lasting fit
• Comfortable side-seamed construction
• Shoulder-to-shoulder taping for added durability

Thank you for wearing your heart and helping us make a difference—one shirt at a time.

name: Fight for Rob ALS TEE
shortDescription: Hello friends! Earlier this year Rob was diagnosed with ALS (Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis) Currently ALS has no known cure. Rob is a loving...
description:
Hello friends! Earlier this year Rob was diagnosed with ALS (Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis) Currently ALS has no known cure. Rob is a loving husband to Paige Burkemper and father tc Makenzie(19),Lucas(13),Eleanor(10),and Violet(9) and a great friend and a wonderful coworker. He sure knows how to make you laugh and have a good time, Help us fight with Rob. For each shirt purchased, all profits ($21) goes to Rob! Lets come together and support him!!

name: Keeping Kid's Hearts Beating Hoodie
shortDescription: Disclaimer: This hoodie runs small. For the perfect fit, we recommend ordering one size larger than your usual size. Here's a Chance for you...
description:
Disclaimer: This hoodie runs small. For the perfect fit, we recommend ordering one size larger than your usual size.

Here's a Chance for you to Make a Difference.**

Every Hoodie helps make an impact.

Most importantly, a portion of every purchase supports Ella’s Umbrella and our mission of **Keeping Kids’ Hearts Beating** by funding heart research, advancing pediatric heart technology, and helping families affected by congenital heart disease.

**Shirt Features:**
• Soft, premium combed and ring-spun cotton
• Pre-shrunk for a lasting fit
• Comfortable side-seamed construction
• Shoulder-to-shoulder taping for added durability

Thank you for wearing your heart and helping us make a difference—one shirt at a time.

• 100% cotton face
• 65% ring-spun cotton, 35% polyester
• Front pouch pocket
• Self-fabric patch on the back
• Matching flat drawstrings
• 3-panel hood

description:
Everyone needs a cozy go-to hoodie to curl up in, so go for one that's soft, smooth, and stylish. It's the perfect choice for cooler evenings!

Heather Sport Dark Navy is 40% cotton, 60% polyester

• Double-lined hood with matching drawcord
• Quarter-turned body to avoid crease down the middle

• Front pouch pocket
• Double-needle stitched collar, shoulders, armholes, cuffs, and hem
